questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'cc7cf6e1-3912-4bae-bd7c-d6b444b7d13b' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '2add0390-a8d6-4356-a8d5-2e9d9c0939d6'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'cc7cf6e1-3912-4bae-bd7c-d6b444b7d13b'; delete from question_items where id = 'cc7cf6e1-3912-4bae-bd7c-d6b444b7d13b';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
